text.title: Freelance Weekly Invoice Cadence Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Freelance Weekly Invoice Cadence methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pull-timesheets
step.input: Timesheet exports for the cycle (CSV / Toggl / Harvest)
step.action: Pull this week's timesheet rows for every active client; reject rows lacking project tag.

step.name: build-invoice-rows
step.action: Compute amount = hours * rate per client; for zero-hours clients emit an explicit zero-row with reason.
step.output: Draft rows[] array; every row carries evidence.
step.decision-gate: Stop if any row has amount > 0 with empty evidence.

step.name: schedule-reminders
step.action: Emit reminders_scheduled[] at +3 / +7 / +14 from due date for unpaid invoices.

step.name: flag-escalations
step.action: Any invoice past +14 -> emit escalation_due row with named owner + named recipient.

step.name: hand-to-operator
step.action: Set status=ready_for_review; surface to operator for final approve-to-send.
step.decision-gate: Operator must approve before any send fires.
